daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Day: Falcon Heavy and Aurora Alert!

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is set to launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite, enhancing global communications.

top_events.title: Aurora Alert: G1 Storm
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at higher latitudes.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Atlas V 551 | Amazon Leo (LA-06)
top_events.description: ULA's Atlas V rocket will launch Amazon's Leo satellites, expanding broadband access.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
